---
name: New module proposal
about: Propose a module idea before or without writing code
title: "[module] "
labels: new module
---

**What should it do**
(sound description, or the effect/behavior you want)

**Source or effect?**


**Params you imagine it needing**


**Reference** (optional)
Link to a sound, patch, or existing hardware/plugin this is inspired by.

Don't feel obligated to write the code yourself — this issue is enough to
start a conversation. If you do want to implement it, see `CONTRIBUTING.md`.
